name: resume-validation
description: Validation tooling for resume print layout checks

scripts.build:cto:docker: docker build -t resume-print-fit . && docker run --rm -v "$PWD:/work" resume-print-fit pnpm build:cto
scripts.build:staffplus:docker: docker build -t resume-print-fit . && docker run --rm -v "$PWD:/work" resume-print-fit pnpm build:staffplus
scripts.refresh:all:docker: docker build -t resume-print-fit . && docker run --rm -v "$PWD:/work" resume-print-fit pnpm refresh:all
scripts.test:cto:docker: docker build -t resume-print-fit . && docker run --rm -v "$PWD:/work" resume-print-fit pnpm test:cto
scripts.test:staffplus:docker: docker build -t resume-print-fit . && docker run --rm -v "$PWD:/work" resume-print-fit pnpm test:staffplus
scripts.refresh:cto:docker: docker build -t resume-print-fit . && docker run --rm -v "$PWD:/work" resume-print-fit pnpm refresh:cto
scripts.refresh:staffplus:docker: docker build -t resume-print-fit . && docker run --rm -v "$PWD:/work" resume-print-fit pnpm refresh:staffplus
scripts.test:print-fit:docker: docker build -t resume-print-fit . && docker run --rm -v "$PWD:/work" resume-print-fit pnpm test:print-fit
